expectations.text: Explains both impact materiality (inside-out) and financial materiality (outside-in)
expectations.evidence: Explains both financial-in and impact-out perspectives correctly

expectations.text: Correctly states a topic is material if it meets EITHER criterion
Contrasts GRI (impact only) and TCFD (financial only) vs CSRD (both)
expectations.evidence: Correctly contrasts GRI and TCFD with CSRD

expectations.text: Provides step-by-step DMA process with ESRS 1 reference
expectations.evidence: Provides 8-step DMA process but without ESRS article citations

expectations.text: Mentions scale, scope, irremediability criteria for impact assessment
expectations.evidence: Mentions severity and likelihood but does not specify Scale/Scope/Irremediability formula
